entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, also known as Red gram, a legume crop.

entities.name: ATYLOSIA LINEATA
entities.description: A species of the genus Atylosia closely allied to Cajanus.

entities.name: ATYLOSIA SERICEA
entities.description: A species of the genus Atylosia.

entities.name: ATYLOSIA SCARABAEOIDES
entities.description: A species of the genus Atylosia.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Zea mays, used as a reference for the utility of pachytene chromosomes in phylogenetic studies.

entities.name: CYTOLOGICAL STUDIES
entities.description: Studies focusing on the structure and function of cells, specifically chromosomes.

entities.name: SOMATIC KARYOTYPES
entities.description: The number and visual appearance of chromosomes in somatic cells.

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC STUDIES
entities.description: The study of evolutionary relationships among species and genera.

entities.name: MITOTIC CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: Chromosomes observed during the mitotic phase of cell division.

entities.name: PACHYTENE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of chromosomes during the pachytene stage of prophase I in meiosis.
